title: Bridge Essay: P300 Following Four Voluntarily Regulated Yoga Breathing Practices and Breath Aw

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**P300 Following Four Voluntarily Regulated Yoga Breathing Practices and Breath Awareness.** — Clin EEG Neurosci. PMID: 35317637. DOI: 10.1177/15500594221089369. Attention was influenced by yoga breathing in previously published research. Each yoga breathing practice uniquely modifies specific breath characteristics. Differences in the study designs, assessment methods and interventions resulted in difficulty in comparing effects between yoga breathing practices. This study aimed (i) to compare four yoga breathing practices on attention using an auditory oddball task and (ii) to determine cardiac autonomic activity associated with attention using heart r
